default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO content partnership between GrowthHax.ai and Metadata.io](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthHax.ai offers AI-powered content creation at scale (200+ articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Potential for white-label partnership to offer content services to Metadata clients](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Metadata interested in revamping their own content strategy and website](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Initial engagement proposed at $9k/month for 100k words (40-50 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

## Topics

### GrowthHax.ai's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI to generate high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Human editors involved for quality control and final touches](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Can adapt to brand voice and incorporate existing company materials](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Typical workflow: keyword research → outline → content generation → human editing](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Aims for 2-3k word articles, publishing 1-2 per day](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [White-label option for Metadata to offer content services to clients](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Suggested starting with one pilot client to validate process](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Pricing could be adjusted based on level of strategy/management required](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Possibility of revenue sharing model after proof of concept](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)

### Metadata's Content Needs

  - [Current website content is outdated and limited](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Interest in leveraging existing video/podcast content for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Need for consistent, high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Desire to improve organic search presence and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [GrowthHax.ai doesn't currently offer full website development services](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Discussion of potentially moving Metadata's site to Webflow for easier management](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Metadata looking to reduce reliance on current agency for site management](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Focus on creating "halo effect" around brand with varied, relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Importance of lead magnets and conversion optimization alongside content](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Potential for cross-linking between non-competing GrowthHax clients](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to set up communication channel for ongoing discussions](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
  - [Send SOW (Statement of Work) for potential Metadata engagement](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
  - [Discuss potential kickoff date for Metadata content project](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
  - [Anthony to provide more details on potential white-label client needs](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
  - [Explore one pilot client for white-label partnership](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=2681.0)
  - [Further discussion on website management options for Metadata](https://fathom.video/share/vLPNg522VaNyQ5FQGSXcjbs1gke9GLvg?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)

action_items.description: Compile list of Metadata videos/podcasts for potential content repurposing
Discuss potential Webflow partnership in Friday meeting w/ CPO; report back to Abdallah re: website management options
Create communication channel for team; send SLW with potential kickoff dates for Metadata engagement
Outline client-facing content strategy process for Marcel to determine white-label pricing/scope
Select 1 friendly, high-trust client for potential content production pilot w/ Marcel's team
